particulars.description: All that freehold land and buildings known as land lying to the south of 180 coombe lane west kingston upon thames KT2 7DE (title number SGL677967); and. All the freehold land and buildings known as 180. coombe lane west, kingston upon thames KT2 7DE (title number SGL677966).
